accurate.why: All claims match the bill text: the DOE rule, its Federal Register publication date, disapproval, and approval date are correct.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; the resolution mechanism and details align with the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the resolution nullifies a DOE energy conservation rule for gas-fired instantaneous water heaters.

changes_to_existing_law.why: It identifies that the rule is disapproved and will have no force or effect, though it omits the CRA (chapter 8 of title 5) basis, which is acceptable context.

exceptions_conditions.why: The bill contains no material exceptions or conditions to summarize.

effective_dates.why: The summary correctly notes the May 9, 2025 approval date and the rule's December 26, 2024 publication date.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the sole operative effect: disapproval of the rule so it has no force or effect.

objective_tone.why: The summary is neutral and non-partisan.

coherent.why: The summary is well-organized and reads clearly.

concise.why: The summary is brief with no padding or filler.

correct_entities.why: The Department of Energy and the rule's subject are correctly identified.

correct_figures.why: The dates stated (December 26, 2024 and May 9, 2025) match the bill text.
